name: rung_310_story_cross_clause_pronoun_weave
utterances: Treat this as a messy family chapter with pronouns crossing clauses.
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).
Rain-letter digest: Tomas is Irena's parent. Tomas is Olan's parent. Irena is Soren's parent. Irena is Pella's parent. Pella is Neri's parent.
The place lines and prop line were copied on the back page: Set at(neri, ivy_stacks). Set inside(ivy_stacks, ember_library). Set carries(irena, brass_compass).
Before the copy edits start, is Tomas already an ancestor of Neri, and does Irena still hold the compass?
Copy note: the clause about her brother's girl belongs to Olan's branch, not Irena's, so retract parent(irena, pella).
Copy note continuation: Set parent(olan, pella).
Pronoun memo, annoying but usable: retract carries(irena, brass_compass).
Pronoun memo continuation: Set carries(soren, brass_compass).
Last staging cleanup: retract at(neri, ivy_stacks).
Last staging continuation: Set at(neri, lower_gallery). Set inside(lower_gallery, ember_library).
Final continuity query: query ancestor(tomas, neri). Query carries(soren, brass_compass). Query in_region(neri, ember_library).
